business.name: Arrow Electric
business.tagline: Reliable electrical service for Ocean County homes

hero.headline: The electrician *Ocean County* calls first
hero.subheadline: Licensed, insured, and treating every home like our own since day one.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, switch, and panel
services_section.subheading: From simple outlets to complete electrical upgrades

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old breaker boxes replaced with modern 100+ amp service. Proper permits secured every time.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Indoor and outdoor lighting, dimmers, accent lighting for kitchens and patios.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Work
services.description: New outlets, GFCI upgrades, dimmer switches, and electrical repairs throughout your home.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Troubleshooting electrical issues, fixing faulty wiring, and getting your power back on track.

about.heading: Toms River's trusted electrical team
about.body: We're the electricians your neighbors recommend to their family. One call, honest pricing, work done right.

reviews.name: Patrick V.
reviews.text: My parents recommended Arrow Electric after using them for years. Devin was very accommodating for our new house electrical updates.

reviews.name: Marie L.
reviews.text: Used them for multiple jobs - outdoor lighting, kitchen island lights, dimmer switches. Most recent was gimbal lighting for my kitchen mural.

reviews.name: Melissa R.
reviews.text: Great work, extremely professional, always on time, fair prices. Devin and Diane are a pleasure to work with.

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work handled?
cta.body: Free estimates on all electrical work. Licensed, insured, and ready to solve your electrical needs.
